bravojuandb/navarra-data-batch-pipeline.description: Reproducible batch pipeline that standardizes Navarra's Economic Establishments Registry, converting raw CSV into a structured analytics-ready Parquet file. Non-destructive: raw data is never modified.

civio/presupuesto-navarra.description: Adaptación de DVMI para los presupuestos de Navarra

geoinnova/navarra_cadastre.description: Plugin para descargar el catastro de un municipio de la Comunidad Foral de Navarra (España)

guillermodean/Megalitos.description: Aplicación web de la SCN Gorosti desarrollada para la divulgación del material recogido relativo a las estaciones megalíticas de Navarra

javikalsan/covid19-navarra.description: A simple ETL to visualize the impact of covid-19 in Navarra from opendata official data source.

juan-gamero-salinas/indoor-overheating-a.description: This is an interactive prototype developed to estimate the risk of overheating inside homes during heatwaves in Pamplona, Navarra. The goal is to help identify vulnerable households using a classification model based on real data (surveys).

rOpenSpain/CatastRoNav.description: R package to query Catastro de Navarra (Spain)

sitna/api-sitna.description: JavaScript API for georeferenced data viewing in web applications
